creator: sobomax@altavista.net
text:
Attached patch enables feature which allows WINE port to build dlls' code in a shared library separately from the main WINE's code. This should (at least teorethically) reduce WINE's memory footpring, especially when several WINEs loaded simulateneously.

Also fix for a small Makefile inconsistency provided as well (typo: MAN1 instead of MAN5).
